languages.text: {n}Он устало смотрит на Паскаля.{/n} "Я готов передать привилегии вивисекции досточтимому магосу, если он пожелает взять на себя сие таинство".
{n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."
languages.original_text: {n}Он устало смотрит на Паскаля.{/n} "Я готов передать привилегии вивисекции досточтимому магосу, если он пожелает взять на себя сие таинство".

traits.locale_text: {n}He casts a tired gaze upon Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the venerable Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."
{n}He casts a tired gaze upon Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the venerable Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."
{n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."
{n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

languages.text: {n}Lanza una mirada cansada a Pasqal.{/n} «Estoy listo para otorgar el privilegio de la vivisección al estimado magos, si desea realizar el ritual».
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Lanza una mirada cansada a Pasqal.{/n} «Estoy listo para otorgar el privilegio de la vivisección al estimado magos, si desea realizar el ritual».

languages.text: {n}他疲惫地看向帕斯卡。{/n}“若尊敬的贤者愿意施行活体解剖仪式，我愿意将这特权拱手相让。”
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}他疲惫地看向帕斯卡。{/n}“若尊敬的贤者愿意施行活体解剖仪式，我愿意将这特权拱手相让。”

languages.text: {n}Er wirft Pasqal einen müden Blick zu.{/n} "Ich bin bereit, das Privileg der Vivisektion an den geschätzten Magos abzutreten, sofern er den Ritus durchführen möchte."
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er wirft Pasqal einen müden Blick zu.{/n} "Ich bin bereit, das Privileg der Vivisektion an den geschätzten Magos abzutreten, sofern er den Ritus durchführen möchte."

languages.text: {n}Il adresse un regard las à Pasqal.{/n} « Je suis prêt à laisser le privilège de la vivisection à l'estimé magos, s'il se porte volontaire pour accomplir le rituel. »
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il adresse un regard las à Pasqal.{/n} « Je suis prêt à laisser le privilège de la vivisection à l'estimé magos, s'il se porte volontaire pour accomplir le rituel. »

languages.text: {n}Yorgun bir şekilde Pasqal'a bakıyor.{/n} "Eğer ayini gerçekleştirmek isterse dirikesim ayrıcalığını saygıdeğer Magos'a bahşetmeye hazırım."
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yorgun bir şekilde Pasqal'a bakıyor.{/n} "Eğer ayini gerçekleştirmek isterse dirikesim ayrıcalığını saygıdeğer Magos'a bahşetmeye hazırım."

languages.text: {n}パスカルは疲れた顔で言った。{/n}「もしマゴスが儀式を行うことを望むなら、私は彼に解剖の特権を与える用意があります。」
languages.original_text: {n}He looks wearily at Pasqal.{/n} "I am ready to grant the privilege of vivisection to the esteemed Magos, should he wish to perform the rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}パスカルは疲れた顔で言った。{/n}「もしマゴスが儀式を行うことを望むなら、私は彼に解剖の特権を与える用意があります。」
